TestGenPipelineState.description: State model derived from TestGenPipeline TLA+ spec

PassValues.description: Verifier for invariant PassValues from TestGenPipeline spec

StageValues.description: Verifier for invariant StageValues from TestGenPipeline spec

TypeOK.message:
TypeOK violation: /\ pass_completed     \in PassValues
    /\ verification_stage \in StageValues
    /\ verification_passed \in BOOLEAN...
TypeOK.description: Verifier for invariant TypeOK from TestGenPipeline spec

FileWrittenOnlyAfterCodegen.description: Verifier for invariant FileWrittenOnlyAfterCodegen from TestGenPipeline spec

VerificationRequiresFile.description: Verifier for invariant VerificationRequiresFile from TestGenPipeline spec

VerificationRequiresCodegen.description: Verifier for invariant VerificationRequiresCodegen from TestGenPipeline spec

VerificationPassedRequiresRun.description: Verifier for invariant VerificationPassedRequiresRun from TestGenPipeline spec

VerificationPassedRequiresCodegen.description: Verifier for invariant VerificationPassedRequiresCodegen from TestGenPipeline spec

RetryNeverBelowReview.description: Verifier for invariant RetryNeverBelowReview from TestGenPipeline spec

AttemptBounded.description: Verifier for invariant AttemptBounded from TestGenPipeline spec

TerminationSound.message:
TerminationSound violation: pipeline_done =>
        verification_passed \/ attempt = MaxAttempts
TerminationSound.description: Verifier for invariant TerminationSound from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_PassValues.description: Test assertion for PassValues from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_StageValues.description: Test assertion for StageValues from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_TypeOK.condition:
and pass_completed     in PassValues
    and verification_stage in StageValues
    and verification_passed in BOOLEAN
    and attempt            in 1..MaxAttempts
    and file_written       in BOOLEAN
    and pipeline_done      in BOOLEAN
assert_TypeOK.message:
Assertion failed: TypeOK — /\ pass_completed     \in PassValues
    /\ verification_stage \in StageValues
    /\ verification_passed \in BOOLEAN...
assert_TypeOK.description: Test assertion for TypeOK from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_FileWrittenOnlyAfterCodegen.description: Test assertion for FileWrittenOnlyAfterCodegen from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_VerificationRequiresFile.description: Test assertion for VerificationRequiresFile from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_VerificationRequiresCodegen.description: Test assertion for VerificationRequiresCodegen from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_VerificationPassedRequiresRun.description: Test assertion for VerificationPassedRequiresRun from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_VerificationPassedRequiresCodegen.condition:
verification_passed implies
        and file_written
        and pass_completed = "CODEGEN"
assert_VerificationPassedRequiresCodegen.message:
Assertion failed: VerificationPassedRequiresCodegen — verification_passed =>
        /\ file_written
        /\ pass_completed = "CODEGEN"
assert_VerificationPassedRequiresCodegen.description: Test assertion for VerificationPassedRequiresCodegen from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_RetryNeverBelowReview.description: Test assertion for RetryNeverBelowReview from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_AttemptBounded.description: Test assertion for AttemptBounded from TestGenPipeline spec

assert_TerminationSound.condition:
pipeline_done implies
        verification_passed or attempt = MaxAttempts
assert_TerminationSound.message:
Assertion failed: TerminationSound — pipeline_done =>
        verification_passed \/ attempt = MaxAttempts
assert_TerminationSound.description: Test assertion for TerminationSound from TestGenPipeline spec
